name: OpenLoopholes Tax Optimizer
description: AI-powered tax optimization engine. Finds legal tax savings by scanning the entire US tax code.

skills.name: optimize_taxes
skills.description: Run the tax optimization loop on a profile. Finds strategies to reduce tax liability.

parameters.profile_name: Name of profile JSON file (e.g., sample.json)

skills.name: generate_chart
skills.description: Generate the staircase chart showing optimization progress.

skills.name: generate_report
skills.description: Generate the CPA-ready HTML tax strategy report.

skills.name: find_loopholes
skills.description: Find strategy combinations that produce synergistic savings.

skills.name: discover_strategies
skills.description: Scan IRC sections for new tax strategies not yet in the registry.

parameters.subtitle: IRC subtitle to scan (A, B, C, ... or --all)

skills.name: parse_return
skills.description: Parse a tax return PDF into a structured JSON profile.

skills.name: parse_tax_code
skills.description: Download and parse the full IRC Title 26 into individual sections.

optional.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
optional.description: API key for OpenRouter (if not using OpenClaw's built-in LLM)

optional.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
optional.description: API key for Anthropic (if using Claude models directly)
